sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56126" key="kato/xion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατόχ-ιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, ἐμβρύων</foreign> preventive of miscarriage, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg002:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.32</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
